title: NvmMetadata access/flags fields undocumented
description: nvm.rs: NvmMetadata.access and NvmMetadata.flags are raw u16 fields with no documentation. A contributor or user has no way to know what bit patterns are valid or what the fields control. The wolfHSM C headers define WH_NVM_ACCESS_* and WH_NVM_FLAGS_* constants for these fields, but they are not referenced anywhere in the Rust code. Add doc comments citing the wolfHSM header constants, or at minimum point to wh_nvm.h so a reader knows where to look.
